verdict.summary: Guide is mostly accurate on the standard AMIM route and fees, but it is materially incomplete on the oncology fast-track exception, appeal/deadline rules, and the strict category-specific conditions for car tax benefits.

issues.current: Его выдают не семейный врач и не частная клиника, а junta médica после оценки документов и, при необходимости, осмотра.
issues.problem: This is correct for the ordinary route but misleading as an absolute statement. There is a simplified AMIM regime for oncological disease where the certificate can be issued without the ordinary junta médica route, by the relevant hospital/specialist route, with specific validity/degree rules.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Обычно AMIM выдаёт junta médica. Исключение: для некоторых онкологических заболеваний действует упрощённый режим — AMIM может оформляться через hospital/médico especialista по специальным правилам, без обычного ожидания junta médica.» Add a separate oncology note in the application section.
issues.source: SNS 24: Atestado Médico de Incapacidade Multiuso; Decreto-Lei 202/96, as amended, special regime for oncological disease

issues.current: ISV: возможное освобождение при покупке автомобиля для pessoa com deficiência, если выполнены отдельные условия
issues.problem: Too vague for a high-value benefit. ISV exemption is not a general benefit for anyone with AMIM ≥60%; it depends on the legal category of disability, degree, vehicle limits, prior recognition by AT/Alfândega, and restrictions on transfer/use.
issues.suggestion: Add the main caveat: «ISV não é automático: обычно требуются категории вроде deficiência motora ≥60%, multideficiência profunda ≥90%, deficiência visual ≥95% или pessoa com deficiência das Forças Armadas ≥60%, плюс лимиты автомобиля и предварительное признание льготы в AT/Alfândega до покупки/регистрации.»
issues.source: Código do Imposto sobre Veículos, arts. 54.º-57.º; Autoridade Tributária guidance on ISV exemptions for persons with disabilities

issues.current: IVA: возможная льгота/освобождение при покупке автомобиля для некоторых категорий инвалидности
issues.problem: The wording is directionally correct but incomplete for a sensitive tax benefit. VAT exemption/reduced treatment for vehicles is category-specific and normally tied to the same strict disability categories and prior procedures; AMIM ≥60% alone is not enough.
issues.suggestion: Write: «IVA на автомобиль: возможна только для определённых категорий pessoas com deficiência и при соблюдении процедур AT; одного AMIM ≥60% обычно недостаточно. Проверяйте eligibility до покупки.»
issues.source: Código do IVA, art. 15.º; Autoridade Tributária guidance on vehicle VAT exemptions for persons with disabilities

issues.current: IUC: возможное освобождение или ограничение налога на автомобиль при incapacidade ≥60% и соблюдении условий
issues.problem: This is broadly correct but should mention the important practical limits: typically one vehicle, registration with AT, and the exemption is capped/limited rather than unlimited.
issues.suggestion: Write: «IUC: при incapacidade ≥60% возможна льгота для одного автомобиля, с регистрацией/признанием в AT и с лимитом освобождения; если IUC выше лимита, может уплачиваться разница.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 5.º; Autoridade Tributária guidance on IUC exemption for persons with disabilities

issues.current: Если junta médica установила процент ниже ожидаемого, можно подать recurso.
issues.problem: The guide omits the statutory appeal deadline. Saying only that the person should ask the deadline is weaker than necessary and may cause missed appeals.
issues.suggestion: Add: «Срок для recurso обычно 30 дней с уведомления о решении; не ждите, сразу уточняйте форму подачи и адрес направления recurso.»
issues.source: Decreto-Lei 202/96, regime de avaliação de incapacidade, recurso hierárquico

issues.problem: The legal framework/SNS guidance refers to a deadline for holding the junta médica after the request, but the guide gives no timeframe. In practice there are delays, but readers should know the official benchmark.
issues.suggestion: Add: «По закону junta médica должна быть realizada в установленный срок — обычно указывается 60 дней после подачи request — но на практике в некоторых ULS бывают задержки; сохраняйте comprovativo подачи.»
issues.source: SNS 24: Atestado Médico de Incapacidade Multiuso; Decreto-Lei 202/96

issues.current: Документы должны быть понятны португальским врачам; иностранные отчёты лучше перевести на PT/EN, особенно если они ключевые
issues.problem: English may be understandable medically, but Portuguese public authorities/medical boards are not obliged to rely on foreign-language documentation. For key foreign reports, Portuguese translation is safer; certified translation may be needed where authenticity/formal use matters.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Ключевые иностранные документы лучше перевести на португальский; для официальных/спорных документов используйте certified translation или relatório португальского специалиста, который суммирует иностранные findings.»
issues.source: General administrative practice; SNS/ULS practice for AMIM documentation

issues.problem: Presented as a required document. In practice número de utente is the normal and strongly recommended route, but the core legal entitlement to request assessment should not be framed as impossible without it; some foreigners may be in the process of SNS registration.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Número de utente SNS — обычно нужен/очень желателен; если его ещё нет, сначала оформите в centro de saúde или уточните в Unidade de Saúde Pública, примут ли request с ID и proof of residence.»
issues.source: SNS 24: Atestado Médico de Incapacidade Multiuso

issues.current: Only SNS 24, ERS, Decreto-Lei 202/96 and Decreto-Lei 352/2007 are cited.
issues.problem: The guide discusses IRS, ISV, IVA, IUC and Prestação Social para a Inclusão, but does not cite official AT/Segurança Social sources for those sensitive benefits. This is risky because eligibility is detailed and benefit-specific.
issues.suggestion: Add official sources: Autoridade Tributária pages or legal provisions for IRS disability deductions, Código do ISV arts. 54.º-57.º, Código do IVA art. 15.º, Código do IUC art. 5.º, and Segurança Social guide/page for Prestação Social para a Inclusão.
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária; Código do IRS; Código do ISV; Código do IVA; Código do IUC; Segurança Social

missing_topics: Simplified AMIM route for oncological disease and how it differs from ordinary junta médica
Statutory appeal deadline, normally 30 days, and where/how recurso is filed
Official expected timeframe for junta médica and practical delays by ULS
Detailed car-tax eligibility categories and requirement to obtain recognition before purchase/registration
Validity/renewal caveats for permanent AMIM and what happens while renewal/reassessment is pending
Official AT and Segurança Social sources for IRS, vehicle-tax benefits and Prestação Social para a Inclusão
